_comment_csp_todo: TODO: Tighten the Content-Security-Policy below by removing 'unsafe-inline' / 'unsafe-eval' and the allorigins.win / third-party-proxy connect-src entries. Requires a coordinated effort with Sentry's runtime expectations and Vite HMR; treat as a separate follow-up and verify in staging before rolling out.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://vercel.live https://*.sentry.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.sentry.io https://vitals.vercel-insights.com https://*.vercel-analytics.com https://res.cloudinary.com https://*.cloudinary.com https://api.allorigins.win; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
